nasb.text: Then they were glad because they were quiet, So He guided them to their desired haven.

esv.text: Then they were glad that the waters were quiet, and he brought them to their desired haven.

cnv.text: 風平浪靜了，他們就歡喜； 他引領他們到他們所願去的港口。

ccb.text: 他们因风平浪静而欢喜， 祂带领他们到所向往的港湾。

csbs.text: 他们因为波涛平静下来就欢喜， 他就引导他们到想要去的安全港。
